Rule description:
Found '$SPAWN' with '{shell: process.platform === "win32"}'. This is dangerous because this call will spawn the command using a shell process. Doing so propagates current shell settings and variables, which makes it much easier for a malicious actor to execute commands. Use '{shell: false}' instead.
